Describe the change briefly.

## Checks

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `python -m build` when packaging or install-facing docs changed
- [ ] `cd web && npm run build && npm run lint` when frontend changed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or contract changed

## Contract impact

- [ ] No identity contract change
- [ ] Identity/spec change documented explicitly
